name: Wand of Reaching (9th-Rank)
description:
This long, slender wand is constructed of silver, polished to a mirror shine.

Activate Cast a Spell; This activation takes (2 Actions) if the spell normally takes (1 Action) to cast, or (3 Actions) if the spell normally takes (2 Actions)

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You Cast the Spell. Its range increases by 30 feet. As normal for increasing ranges, if the spell normally has a range of touch, its range extends to 30 feet.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of a spell of the appropriate rank. The spell must have a casting time of (1 Action) or (2 Actions), and must have a range.
